reading.title: Reading: Review — An achievement
reading.passage: I have already finished my first book. I started it two years ago, and I have worked on it since I was in university. It has just been published last month.

questions.question: The book started two years ago.
When was the book published?
questions.explanation: "it has just been published last month."

reading.title: Reading: Safety warning
reading.passage: If you don't wear a helmet, you will get a fine. If we follow the safety rules, there will be fewer accidents. If the company breaks this regulation, it will face a penalty.

questions.question: Following safety rules will mean fewer accidents.
questions.explanation: "If we follow the safety rules, there will be fewer accidents."

questions.question: What happens if you don't wear a helmet?
questions.explanation: "If you don't wear a helmet, you will get a fine."
